rationale: Section 11.145 governs income-producing tangible personal property exemptions and is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in Section 11.13(b). No overlap or conflict exists between the two provisions.
quote: a person is entitled to an exemption from taxation by a taxing unit of $125,000 of the appraised value of the tangible personal property the person owns that is held or used for the production of income
_note: No conflict; §11.145 addresses a distinct exemption category (income-producing tangible personal property) unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase under §11.13(b).
